# Kern — Agency Operating System
# https://kern.app

## About
Kern is an all-in-one agency operating system that replaces Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Linear, and Buffer in a single workspace. Built for agency founders and small teams managing clients, projects, and operations.

## What Kern replaces
- Slack → Real-time inbox with project rooms, group chats, and DMs
- Notion + Google Drive → Vault (Google Drive-backed file management, role-scoped)
- HubSpot → Built-in CRM for leads, investors, partners, advisors, and talent
- Linear / Asana → Time-horizon task system (Today, This Week, Delegated, Backlog)
- Buffer / Taplio → LinkedIn Studio for drafting, scheduling, and tracking posts
- Calendly + Google Calendar → Calendar with Google Meet auto-generation

## Pricing
- Starter: $30/month per workspace + $3/seat
- Pro: $79/month + $5/seat
- Agency: $149/month + $5/seat

## Key facts
- Founded: 2026
- Stage: Pre-seed, revenue generating, 5 active agency customers
- Founder: Arham Mirkar
- AI layer: In development — context-aware AI across all modules using @AI mentions, global command bar (Cmd+K), daily morning briefs, and background automations

## Documentation
Full documentation available at: https://kern-web.vercel.app/docs

## Blog
Agency operations essays and guides: https://kern-web.vercel.app/blog
